title: knautia lancifolia subsp. pocutica
intro: Knautia lancifolia subsp. pocutica, also known as the Pocutian knautia, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Caprifoliaceae. It is a perennial plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Knautia lancifolia subsp. pocutica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural antiseptic to combat infections. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
